meta.note: [provenance:reference-impl-aligned В§6.7 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-07-01] The inline frame decoration accepts either particle вҖ” `гҒҜ` (is framed) or `гҒ«` (frame applied to) вҖ” and the corpus spells the keyword зҪ«еӣІгҒҝ / жһ еӣІгҒҝ / жһ еӣІгҒ„ (okurigana variant). This vector pins the гҒ«-particle + жһ еӣІгҒҝ form; canonical serialize folds both the particle (гҒ«вҶ’гҒҜ) and the keyword (жһ еӣІгҒҝвҶ’зҪ«еӣІгҒҝ) so the construct re-forms identically, idempotent after pass 1 (В§7.6). Distinct from еӨӘеӯ—/ж–ңдҪ“, which are гҒҜ-only (В§6.12).
